phase_order.exit_condition: deep operational cartography audit runs and names disconnected systems without false production claims
full project, compact runtime, and forensic archive packages are emitted with lifecycle receipts and exclusions made explicit
operator messages have lane/organ timelines, requested/effective lane transitions, receipt hydration mapping, and debug timing overlays
ChatGPT browser, Cursor, and Codex extension each have mount proof, capability survey, return intake, and stop conditions
external/local workers cannot return without context proof, template action proof, lifecycle check, and Steward integration
template graph writebacks and execution cycles produce compact residues and archive raw evidence without deleting proof
production gates are separate from branch versions and release verifier can explain all blocks

true_north: Make ION operational by proving every core system as wired runtime, not merely doctrine or isolated modules.
